description: issue #332 (A2): executing the bare `debug` meta-command emits exactly one `tutor-output` event with `command: "debug"`, a non-empty `segments` array, and no `diagnostic_code`/`target_source_span` — same shape rationale as `why`'s fixture (the diagnostic arm is out of scope: a runtime diagnostic halts execution terminally, before a `debug` call could ever observe one from its own run).

segments: Here is what to check about your program.
